Article Title: Handbrake not properly engaged? Elderly woman crushed to death by Thar in UP
Article Text: LUCKNOW: An elderly woman died after being crushed between an SUV and a wall at a house in Uttar Pradesh’s Farrukhabad district.The accident took place at around 8.30pm on April 2.CCTV footage of the incident, which has since circulated widely online, shows the woman opening the gate to allow a Thar to enter the premises.After the vehicle drives in, she begins to shut the gate.Moments later, the SUV appears to roll backwards, trapping her against the boundary wall. Her cries can be heard in the video as she is pinned.A young man is then seen running towards the vehicle, apparently attempting to stop it. He struggles to open the door before raising an alarm and rushing inside the house to call for help.According to reports, the vehicle may have rolled back because the handbrake had not been properly engaged.
Article Summary: The accident took place at around 8.30pm on April 2. CCTV footage shows the woman opening the gate to allow a Thar to enter the premises. The SUV appears to roll backwards, trapping her against the boundary wall. Her cries can be heard in the video as she is pinned.

Article Title: Dindori Car Accident: 9 members of a family, including 6 children, dead as car falls into water-filled well
Article Text:
Poll Do you think more safety measures should be implemented for vehicles traveling in rural areas? Yes No





NASHIK: Nine members of a family, including six children, died in an incident late Friday night after their vehicle plunged into a well in Dindori, around 25 km from Nashik.The accident took place at about 10 pm in the Shivaji Nagar area.The victims, who were residents of Indore village in Dindori, were returning home in a multi-purpose vehicle (MPV) after attending a coaching class get-together in the town.According to police reports, the driver of the MPV apparently failed to spot the well in the darkness while driving through the Shivaji Nagar area. The vehicle veered off the path and fell directly into the deep well, trapping all occupants inside.Police inspector Bhagwan Mathure of the Dindori Police Station stated that as soon as they were alerted, a rescue team rushed to the spot.“We deployed two hydra cranes and sought the assistance of local swimmers to reach the submerged vehicle. Despite the swift rescue efforts, none of the occupants survived," PI Mathure said.The rescue operation lasted over two hours. The MPV and the bodies of the victims were eventually pulled out of the well by 12.15 am on Saturday.The bodies were immediately shifted to the govt hospital in Dindori.The deceased have been identified as Sunil Dattu Dargude (32), Reshma Sunil Dargude (27), Asha Anil Dargude (32), Khushi Anil Dargude (14), Madhuri Anil Dargude (13), Shreyas Anil Dargude (11), Rakhi (Gunvanti) Sunil Dargude (11), Shravani Anil Dargude (11), and Samruddhi Rajendra Dargude (7).
Article Summary: Nine members of a family, including six children, died in an incident late Friday night. Their vehicle plunged into a well in Dindori, around 25 km from Nashik. The victims were returning home in a multi-purpose vehicle (MPV) after attending a coaching class.

Article Title: Stephen Curry: “I’m pulled in different areas”: Stephen Curry opens up about pressure in his family life as Ayesha Curry faces scrutiny
Article Text:
Stephen Curry opens up about pressure in his family life as Ayesha Curry faces scrutiny.(Image via Getty Images)

Stephen Curry shares an honest opinion about the pressure of responsibilities he faces in his personal life amid marriage to Ayesha Curry



Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, got brutally trolled for her controversial comments on marriage



Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, and his wife, Ayesha Curry, seem to have built a pretty beautiful life for themselves and their four young children.While the NBA legend Stephen Curry has always tried to keep his personal and professional life different, the four time NBA champion has been vocal about the pressure he faces in his life.A few weeks ago, in an interview with CNBC, the Golden State Warriors’ star player opened up about the pressure he is under at home as he said, "It's an idea of, 'Are you doing everything you can to take care of people that are relying on you?'"The NBA legend added, “Are you fulfilling your full potential in all different areas that I've set out to do? [...] We all like to be a better husband, a better father, more present at times, just because we're pulled — I'm pulled — in a lot of different areas…”Stephen Curry continued, “Those are daily commitments, daily thoughts that you have to weave through."Over the last few years, Stephen Curry’s high profile marriage to popular entrepreneur and chef, Ayesha Curry, has raised eyebrows.This has also led to immense trolling as Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, has continuously been trolled and shamed for her comments and opinions.A few months ago, Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, made an appearance on Alex Cooper’s popular podcast, Call Her Daddy, where she opened up about how she had different aspirations in life which were relatively different from marrying an NBA legend.In a heartfelt conversation, Ayesha Curry shared how she initially planned to have a career of her own and did not want to get married or have children.But her feelings changed when she fell deeply in love with the Golden State Warriors’ star player, Stephen Curry, when she was a young adult.The two got married young and have had four children since then.While Ayesha Curry’s statements seemed like an innocent confession, she was brutally trolled as fans accused her of wanting to divorce Stephen Curry.This led to both Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry distancing themselves from the drama even as they continue to remain silent about it.
Article Summary: NBA legend Stephen Curry opens up about pressure in his family life as Ayesha Curry faces scrutiny. Curry’s wife, Ayesham Curry, got brutally trolled for her controversial comments on marriage. Curry and his wife have four young children.

Article Title: Pokimane: Pokimane breaks silence on Myna Snacks and her exit from the brand
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

“Unfortunately, the launch for that did not go as we planned,”

“It taught me that what it means to be a content creator is very, very different from what it means to be a business owner.”

Pokimane says creator role clashed with running Myna Snacks

“There are certain things that most businesses can get away with that you cannot do if you are creator-backed. As soon as I realized, ‘Oh, maybe this isn’t the right time for me to be the face of a product,’ I stepped away from the company and I let them continue operating as they pleased,”

“at least six figures.”



Stay updated with our Live Blog for minute-by-minute coverage of the

Stay updated with our Live Blog for minute-by-minute coverage of the Israel Iran War including breaking news, missile attacks, and Middle East crisis Latest Updates

Pokimane, the popular Twitch streamer, has at last opened up about why she is no longer involved in her own snack company, Myna Snacks. Myna Snacks was launched in 2023 and features products like the Midnight Mini Cookies, which are gluten-free, GMO-free, and contain Vitamin D. Fans have been wondering what happened to the company over the last couple of years, as the company seemed to have vanished into thin air.In a TikTok video posted on April 1, 2026, Pokimane explained the reasons behind her decision. She said that her work as a content creator did not match running a business.she said.She also clarified that she did not take any profits from Myna Snacks, instead letting the money go to staff and other investments.In the video, Pokimane said that her high-profile creator status made it hard to run the brand.she explained.She also reflected on her other business experiences. Pokimane said she never made money from OfflineTV’s equity because she and her co-founders never sold the company. She also sold her stake in RTS, the management company she founded in 2021, earningShe warned fans not to go into business with close friends or people you love, saying it can make things more complicated than necessary.From the comments of Pokimane, the audience is able to understand the reason why Myna Snacks ceased operations. The website of the company is still down, and the exit of Pokimane is an indication that even popular content creators face difficulties in the management of their businesses. Although the business is not under the management of Pokimane anymore, the audience is able to learn from the lessons she hopes will be useful to them in case they wish to start their own business.
Article Summary: Pokimane, the popular Twitch streamer, has at last opened up about why she is no longer involved in her own snack company. Myna Snacks was launched in 2023 and features products like the Midnight Mini Cookies, which are gluten-free, GMO- free and contain Vitamin D.

Article Title: Travis Kelce: Travis Kelce’s big decision reportedly leaves Taylor Swift facing “sleepless nights” weeks before lavish wedding
Article Text:
Travis Kelce’s big decision reportedly leaves Taylor Swift facing “sleepless nights” weeks before lavish wedding.(Image via Getty Images)

Taylor Swift might be having problems with Travis Kelce’s decision to return to the field



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have decided on a luxurious property for their wedding



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are just days away from tying the knot in Rhode Island, after dating for close to three years.While the couple have remained strictly private about what they have been planning for their wedding, Taylor Swift is reportedly facing a few issues as Travis Kelce has decided to return to the field for his 14th season in the league.A few days ago, as per Heat World, a source has revealed that, “Taylor totally supports him going back for another season, it’s what he loves, but it hasn’t made the wedding planning easy…”The source added, “Or the honeymoon for that matter because he’s going to have such limited availability once the preseason starts.”As per Heat World, the source continued, “Travis handed off most of the planning to Taylor because she has a real vision of what she wants. The downside of that is she’s getting very overwhelmed, to the point she’s having sleepless nights as a result.”After the Kansas City Chiefs missed the playoffs in the last season, there were strong rumors about the popular tight end, Travis Kelce, opting for retirement ahead of the upcoming season.But a few days ago, Travis Kelce sparked shockwaves across the league as he announced his contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs for a whopping $54 million.While this had sparked a debate among fans, the billionaire pop star Taylor Swift has stayed away from talking about her future husband’s career in public.Travis Kelce also credited Taylor Swift for motivating him to return to the field for his 14th season as he said, "Without a doubt, we share the same love for what we do, and we've had this, you know, fortunately, we've had this desire since we were kids in our selective professions…”The Kansas City Chiefs’ tight end added, “It's just, it's amazing to see her keep going to the table, keep finding new things to write about, keep finding, you know, new melodies and things like that. And on top of that, still seeing her have that love and joy in what she does."Though Page Six has reported that Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have decided on Ocean Hall in Rhode Island to be their wedding venue, the high profile couple has stayed away from commenting on the rumors.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are just days away from tying the knot in Rhode Island, after dating for close to three years. The couple have remained strictly private about what they have been planning for their wedding. But Taylor Swift is reportedly facing a few issues as Kelce has decided to return to the field for his 14th season in the league.

Article Title: Kansas City Chiefs: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs tipped to target $16M Pro Bowl Atlanta Falcons star TE days after Travis Kelce’s contract extension
Article Text:
Kansas City Chiefs tipped to target $16M Pro Bowl Atlanta Falcons star TE days after Travis Kelce’s contract extension.(Image via X)

Kansas City Chiefs are tipped to explore a deal with the Atlanta Falcons’ popular tight end, Kyle Pitts , after a disappointing season

The Kansas City Chiefs experienced a pretty disappointing run on the field in the last season, with six wins and eleven losses.Last season also marked the first time since 2014 that the Kansas City Chiefs failed to make it to the playoffs. Now, just days after the team signed a contract extension with popular tight end, Travis Kelce , it seems the team is being tipped to lean on the Atlanta Falcons’ star player.After an impressive performance in the last season, the 25 year old Atlanta Falcons’ tight end, Kyle Pitts, is being pitched to the Kansas City Chiefs.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Moe Moton, noted that the Kansas City Chiefs could be interested in signing the Atlanta Falcons’ star player, Kyle Pitts.Bleacher Report’s Moe Moton noted in a report, “The Chiefs could pair Kelce with Pitts, who would take the franchise tight-end baton from the future Hall of Famer. In this scenario, Kelce would likely see a reduced role, which would preserve him for the season.”Moe Moton added, “Early in the previous campaign, head coach Andy Reid discussed managing Kelce’s snap count. With Pitts, he can do that and still get production out of the position in his offense.”This also comes days after Travis Kelce’s $54 million contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs sparked a heated debate among fans.However, the Kansas City Chiefs have remained distant from the speculations.Back in 2021, Kyle Pitts was named to the Pro Bowl in his rookie season as he became the second rookie tight end in NFL history to record over 1,000 receiving yards.The 25 year old Atlanta Falcons’ tight end, Kyle Pitts, recorded a stellar performance in the last season after an underwhelming season in 2024.In the 2025 season, Kyle Pitts finished as one of the top tight ends in the league as he recorded 88 receptions for 928 yards and five touchdowns across 17 games.The Atlanta Falcons’ star player has shown impressive growth since the 2024 season, when he recorded 47 receptions for 602 yards and four touchdowns in 17 games.This also resulted in the Atlanta Falcons placing the franchise tag on Kyle Pitts in February.While the Atlanta Falcons have maintained their distance from trade talks about Kyle Pitts for now, all eyes are on his performance in the next season.
Article Summary: Kansas City Chiefs tipped to target $16M Pro Bowl Atlanta Falcons star TE days after Travis Kelce’s contract extension. Kyle Pitts was named to the Pro Bowl in his rookie season as he became the second rookie tight end in NFL history to record over 1,000 receiving yards. The 25 year old Atlanta Falcons’ tight end recorded a stellar performance in the last season.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Las Vegas Raiders urged to explore $58M Cleveland Browns Pro Bowl WR amid concerns over 2025 form
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders urged to explore $58M Cleveland Browns Pro Bowl WR amid concerns over 2025 form.(Image via X)

Las Vegas Raiders tipped to lean on the Cleveland Browns ’ wide receiver Jerry Jeudy amid a poor performance in the last season

The Las Vegas Raiders’ 2025 season was a pretty disappointing one, with it being the fourth season in a row of missing the playoffs.With just three wins and fourteen losses in the last season, the Las Vegas Raiders are working hard on their roster.While the Las Vegas Raiders recently signed Jalen Nailor, the team is now being encouraged to seek the Cleveland Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry Jeudy.ID@undefinedCaption not available.A few hours ago, Sports Illustrated’s Ryan Shea noted in a report, “Hypothetically, the Las Vegas Raiders could look to add wide receiver Jerry Jeudy to their roster as they prepare for the 2026 season…”Ryan Shea added, “Jeudy’s proven route running, ability to create separation, and deep-field explosiveness could give the franchise quarterback a reliable weapon right away. His presence would help stretch defenses, open opportunities for other receivers, and immediately elevate the Raiders’ passing attack…”He continued, “Jeudy is a polished route runner who can stretch the field, create separation, and give Mendoza a reliable WR1 to build chemistry with from day one.”This has sparked a debate, considering how the Cleveland Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry Jeudy, failed to perform well in the last season after a stellar performance in the 2024 season.However, the Las Vegas Raiders have stayed away from commenting on the speculations.The Cleveland Browns’ star player, Jerry Jeudy, showed immense potential when he was traded to the team in 2024 by the Denver Broncos.Jerry Jeudy was also named to his first Pro Bowl in the 2024 season after he recorded 90 receptions for 1229 receiving yards with four touchdowns in just 17 games.While the Cleveland Browns’ fans expected a lot from him in the 2025 season, unfortunately, Jerry Jeudy’s performance recorded a relatively steady decline.In the last season, the 26 year old Cleveland Browns’ wide receiver recorded 50 receptions for 602 yards and two touchdowns in 17 games.A few days ago, as per Cleveland.com, analyst Dan Labbe opened up about the decline in his performance as he said, “Maybe the version of Jeudy we saw in 2024 was an outlier, but it’s hard to believe the version we saw in 2025 is going to be what he is for the remainder of his time with the Browns…”With a $58 million contract with the Cleveland Browns, all eyes are on whether Jerry Jeudy will be able to prove his worth in the next season.
Article Summary: Las Vegas Raiders tipped to lean on the Cleveland Browns ’ wide receiver Jerry Jeudy amid a poor performance in the last season. Las Vegas Raiders’ 2025 season was a pretty disappointing one, with it being the fourth season in a row of missing the playoffs.

Article Title: America’s most feared serial killer: The story of Ted Bundy, who studied psychology and law before murdering more than 30 women
Article Text:
The normal life of Ted Bundy hid a darker truth

The beginning of a violent pattern

The Utah connection and growing suspicion

Laura Ann Aime

Arrest , escape, and escalation

Trial, media attention, and execution

Inside the mind of Ted Bundy

The women killed by Ted Bundy







More than three decades after his execution, Ted Bundy continues to cast a long shadow over criminal history. Recently, a decades-old mystery was finally resolved when new DNA evidence confirmed his role in the 1974 murder of Laura Ann Aime, a case long suspected but never proven. The announcement by the Utah County Sheriff’s Office closed a painful chapter for the victim’s family, but it also reignited global interest in Bundy himself, a figure whose crimes continue to unfold even decades after his death.The confirmation is more than just a forensic breakthrough. It reinforces the scale and reach of Bundy’s crimes, many of which stretched across multiple US states during the 1970s. With at least 30 confessed victims and the possibility of many more, Bundy’s story remains one of the most studied and unsettling in criminal psychology. Understanding how he operated, and how he managed to evade detection for so long, requires a closer look at the man behind the headlines, his beginnings, his methods, and the disturbing contradictions that defined his life.Bundy was born in 1946 in Vermont and later raised in Washington, where he grew up in what appeared to be an ordinary environment. He was intelligent, articulate, and socially capable. He studied psychology during his university years and later enrolled in law school, even becoming involved in political campaigns.To those around him, he presented the image of a disciplined and ambitious young man with a promising future.What makes Bundy’s story particularly disturbing is precisely this contrast. There were no obvious signs that he would go on to become one of the most notorious serial killers in American history. Friends and acquaintances often described him as polite and charismatic, someone who could easily blend into social settings. This ability to appear normal was not incidental, it became a crucial part of how he carried out his crimes. The gap between his outward persona and his actions continues to challenge assumptions about how dangerous individuals are identified.By the early 1970s, Bundy’s behaviour had escalated into violence. Young women began disappearing in the Pacific Northwest under similar and increasingly alarming circumstances. These were not random acts but part of a developing pattern. Bundy targeted women who often shared similar physical characteristics, and he approached them in public places where he could appear non-threatening.He frequently used deception as his primary tool. Pretending to be injured, sometimes wearing a cast or using crutches, he would ask for help, relying on social instincts of empathy and trust. Once a victim agreed, he would overpower her and take her to a secondary location. This calculated approach allowed him to operate repeatedly without immediate suspicion, moving between states such as Washington, Utah, and Colorado while leaving behind a trail of confusion for investigators.As his crimes continued, the pattern became more refined and more dangerous. The combination of planning, mobility, and manipulation meant that he was able to commit multiple murders before law enforcement could connect the cases. At the time, coordination between jurisdictions was limited, giving him a critical advantage.Bundy’s move to Utah in 1974 marked a significant phase in his killing spree. While attending law school, several young women went missing in the region, including Laura Ann Aime. At the time, authorities suspected connections between cases, but evidence was insufficient to definitively link them to a single perpetrator.Over time, Bundy himself would confess to several murders in Utah, but many details remained unclear. The recent DNA confirmation has now provided concrete evidence in at least one of those cases, demonstrating how modern forensic technology continues to reshape understanding of crimes committed decades ago. The Utah period highlights both the scale of Bundy’s activity and the limitations investigators faced in tracking a mobile offender across different states.Bundy was first arrested in 1975 after a traffic stop raised suspicions. Items found in his vehicle, including tools that could be used for restraint, linked him to earlier incidents. However, his story did not end with arrest. In a series of events that stunned authorities, Bundy managed to escape custody twice while facing murder charges in Colorado.These escapes were not just acts of desperation but reflected his confidence and ability to manipulate situations. After his second escape, he fled to Florida, where his behaviour became more erratic and violent. In 1978, he carried out a brutal attack at a university sorority house, killing two women and injuring others. This marked a shift in his pattern, with less reliance on deception and more direct violence, suggesting an escalation in both urgency and risk.Bundy’s eventual capture in Florida led to one of the most widely followed trials in US history. Unlike most defendants, he chose to represent himself in court, using his legal knowledge to question witnesses and address the jury. His composure and confidence during the proceedings drew significant media attention, turning the trial into a public spectacle.Despite his attempts to defend himself, the evidence against him was overwhelming. He was convicted and sentenced to death. In 1989, Bundy was executed in Florida’s electric chair, bringing an end to his life but not to the impact of his crimes. In the days leading up to his execution, he confessed to multiple murders, offering partial insights into his actions while leaving many questions unanswered.Understanding why Ted Bundy committed his crimes has remained one of the most debated questions in criminal psychology. Unlike many offenders driven by financial gain or personal revenge, Bundy’s motives were far more complex, rooted in a combination of control, fantasy, and psychological disturbance.Investigators who worked closely on the case consistently pointed to power and domination as central elements. Robert Keppel, a detective who interviewed Bundy extensively before his execution, described him as someone driven by “possession” rather than impulse. According to Keppel, Bundy’s crimes were about total control over his victims, both physically and psychologically, rather than any conventional motive.This view is reinforced by the work of John E. Douglas, one of the pioneers of criminal profiling at the Federal Bureau of Investigation. Douglas classified Bundy as a “power-control” offender, a category used for criminals who derive satisfaction from domination rather than material gain. In his analysis, Bundy’s outward charm was not incidental but a calculated tool, allowing him to manipulate trust and lower defences.Bundy himself offered shifting explanations over time. In his final interviews, including conversations with psychologist James C. Dobson, he claimed that exposure to violent pornography had played a role in shaping his behaviour. He described an escalation from curiosity to obsession, eventually leading to violent acts. However, many experts remain sceptical of this explanation, viewing it as a partial truth or deflection rather than a complete account of his motives.Criminologists have also examined Bundy’s early life for clues. His upbringing involved confusion about his parentage, and some researchers suggest this may have contributed to underlying emotional instability. Yet most experts agree that no single factor explains his actions. Instead, his behaviour likely emerged from a combination of personality traits, including lack of empathy, manipulation, and the ability to compartmentalise his life.Detectives who interacted with Bundy often noted his detachment and composure when discussing his crimes. In one account, when asked directly about certain victims, he avoided eye contact and withdrew, suggesting moments where even he struggled to confront his actions. These glimpses, however, were rare, and Bundy remained largely controlled in his interactions.Ultimately, there is no simple answer to why Bundy killed.At a broader level, his story forced a reconsideration of how danger is perceived. Bundy did not fit the conventional image of a criminal. He was educated, articulate, and outwardly trustworthy. This disconnect between appearance and reality remains one of the most unsettling aspects of his case, and one that continues to be studied in psychology and criminology.The recent confirmation in the Laura Ann Aime case underscores a larger truth. Even decades after his death, the full extent of Bundy’s actions is still being uncovered.
Article Summary: Bundy’s story remains one of the most studied and unsettling in criminal psychology. Understanding how he operated, and how he managed to evade detection for so long, requires a closer look at the man behind the headlines, his beginnings, his methods and the disturbing contradictions that defined his life.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding: “She is anxious”: Taylor Swift reportedly fears legal fallout as Justin Baldoni gains ground against Blake Lively ahead of her wedding to Travis Kelce
Article Text:
Taylor Swift reportedly fears legal fallout as Justin Baldoni gains ground against Blake Lively ahead of her wedding to Travis Kelce.(Image via Getty Images)

Taylor Swift reportedly worried about her future as Justin Baldoni records a minor win against Blake Lively, weeks ahead of marrying Travis Kelce



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were often out on dinner dates with Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have made it pretty clear that they are in no mood to invite the pop star’s former best friends, the Hollywood power couple, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds to their high profile wedding.While Taylor Swift has mostly maintained her distance from Blake Lively, it seems the new turn of events has made the pop star worried about her future.A few days ago, Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni’s lawsuit took a turn in Baldoni’s favor as Judge Lewis J. Liman granted him a one week delay in the pretrial process of his legal fight with the actress, after his legal team accused her lawyers of flooding the court with a “document dump.”But as per Rob Shuter, a source has revealed that this turn of events has made the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, “anxious” about her future, just days before she is supposed to tie the knot with the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce.The source added, "Discovery means texts, emails, DMs — everything could come out."As per Rob Shuter, the source continued, "Taylor is very aware of this, if she’s mentioned anywhere in those communications, it could drag her into a legal and PR mess she never signed up for…”The source added, “This isn’t just a lawsuit anymore…It’s a potential exposure of how Hollywood really operates behind the scenes."To make it worse, back in January, a series of controversial texts exchanged between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively related to Justin Baldoni were released in public.Some of the pop star’s comments sparked outrage as she made a few insulting remarks about Justin Baldoni.However, in public, ever since the day she was dragged into the legal mess between Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni, Taylor Swift has stopped hanging out with the actress.Back in 2024, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds were often spotted hanging out with Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce in New York City.The Hollywood power couple were also spotted in a couple of matches as they showed up next to the billionaire pop star to cheer on Travis Kelce.While Taylor Swift and Blake Lively were best friends for a decade, it seems the pop star cut her out of her life when she was dragged into the mess.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have made it clear that they are in no mood to invite the pop star’s former best friends, Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds to their high profile wedding. A source has revealed that this turn of events has made the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, “anxious” about her future.

Article Title: Jonathan Lucroy: Jonathan Lucroy calls out Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce after bold baseball workout comments, highlights true MLB endurance struggle
Article Text:
Jonathan Lucroy calls out Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce after bold baseball workout comments, highlights true MLB endurance struggle (Image via Getty)

Jonathan Lucroy responds to Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce comments on baseball workouts and cardio

Jonathan Lucroy explains MLB season grind and compares it with NFL schedule and physical demands



Jonathan Lucroy did not stay quiet after hearing what Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce said about baseball players. The former MLB catcher quickly responded on April 1 through X, calling out the brothers for how they described baseball training. His main point was just that baseball is not easy, and it demands something very different from football. While the Kelce brothers spoke about cardio and practice routines on their “New Heights” podcast, Lucroy explained that the daily grind of baseball tells a very different story. He reminded them that NFL players suit up once a week, but MLB players step on the field almost every day for months. That difference, he said, changes everything about how players train, recover, and perform over a long season.Jonathan Lucroy reacted directly to what Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce said during their podcast. Jason Kelce questioned why baseball players would spend time doing cardio that, in his view, does not match the game. He said, “There’s zero cardio necessary to be a good baseball player.” Travis Kelce backed that idea by sharing his own high school memory, saying he only ran from foul pole to foul pole.Lucroy pushed back with clear examples. He explained, “The pitchers run poles to endure longer outings.Nolan Ryan did them everyday.” He pointed to Nolan Ryan’s long career and how he was still throwing fast pitches even at 40 years old.Lucroy also broke down how position players train. He said, “Position players run bases for conditioning in Spring Training. During the season, we don’t do much conditioning as an everyday player. Why? Because we play almost EVERYDAY.” His message was that the game itself becomes the workout because of how often players compete.Jonathan Lucroy then explained what life is really like during a baseball season. MLB teams play 162 games, while the NFL schedule has only 17 games. That gap, he said, shows why baseball is about lasting through months of constant play.He shared his own numbers from his career. “That means I did at least 200 squats every game,” Lucroy said, talking about his role as a catcher. Over 120 games, he estimated doing around 24,000 squats in a season, not even counting warmups.Lucroy also made sure to respect football. He said, “NFL games are brutally violent, and I’m not understating that.” But he added that baseball tests players in a different way. “Our game is more about endurance and longevity over a 7 month season of daily attrition,” he wrote. He ended his message with a simple line: “It is a marathon, not a sprint.”
Article Summary: Jonathan Lucroy responded to Travis Kelce and Jason Kelce's comments on baseball workouts and cardio. The former MLB catcher called out the brothers for how they described baseball training. He explained that baseball is not easy, and it demands something very different from football.

Article Title: Ishowspeed Baby Prank: Fact check: Is IShowSpeed having a baby? Truth behind Viral livestream claim about daughter and quitting YouTube
Article Text:
Fact check: Is IShowSpeed having a baby? Truth behind Viral livestream claim about daughter and quitting YouTube (Image via Getty)

IShowSpeed shocks fans with fake baby story and YouTube exit claim during April Fool’s livestream



Watch im quitting youtube💔 im quitting youtube💔

IShowSpeed reveals prank while Slipz and WWE moment add to April Fool’s chaos



Stay updated with our Live Blog for minute-by-minute coverage of the

Stay updated with our Live Blog for minute-by-minute coverage of the Israel Iran War including breaking news, missile attacks, and Middle East crisis Latest Updates

IShowSpeed left fans confused this week after talking about having a baby and quitting YouTube. Many people believed him at first. But the truth is simple. He was joking. The whole moment was part of an April Fool’s Day prank on April 1, 2026. During a 13-minute livestream, Darren Watkins Jr, who is known as IShowSpeed, held what looked like a baby and spoke very seriously. He told viewers he had become a father and wanted to delete his YouTube channel, which has more than 51.8 million subscribers. His tone made it sound real, and fans quickly started reacting online.But near the end of the stream, everything changed. He dropped the “baby,” which turned out to be a doll, and revealed the truth. It was all a prank. No baby. No goodbye. Just a joke for April Fool’s Day.In the livestream, Darren Watkins Jr spoke in an emotional tone that made many people believe him. He said,“I’m about to delete my YouTube channel, bro. Y’all think I’m playing, bro? I’m sorry, chat, but I can’t do this st no more, bro. I never told y’all this st. I never told y’all, bro. I never told y’all, but, chat, eight months ago, I got a girl pregnant, bro.I got a girl pregnant eight months ago. Yeah. I got a girl pregnant eight months ago, and I had a baby. I had a baby, and I had a daughter.”He continued by talking about wanting to grow up and become a father. He said,“I feel like I’ve done everything, chat. Like, I want to start a family. I want to be a dad. You know? Chat, I want to be a dad. I want to start a family. I want to take these in. Chat, don’t you feel like sometimes in life, it’s time for a change? You know, chat, I feel like sometimes in life… it’s time for me to grow up.” Because of how serious he sounded, many fans thought this was real news.At around the 13-minute mark, Darren Watkins Jr suddenly dropped the baby doll and said, “April Fools! Green apples!” That one moment cleared everything. The baby story was fake. The channel was not getting deleted. It was all planned as a prank.At the same time, his cameraman and friend Slipz also joined the fun. On X, Slipz posted a message saying he was leaving the team. He thanked fans and wrote about his journey, making it sound emotional and final. But this, too, was part of the April Fool’s jokes.Away from the prank, IShowSpeed has also been in the news for something real. Recently, he accidentally helped The Vision win the WWE World Tag Team Championship during Monday Night RAW. That moment added to his growing presence outside YouTube as well.
Article Summary: Darren Watkins Jr, known as IShowSpeed, held what looked like a baby and spoke very seriously. He told viewers he had become a father and wanted to delete his YouTube channel. But near the end of the stream, he dropped the “baby,” which turned out to be a doll.

Article Title: Luigi Mangione News: Super Mario actor jokes about CEO killer Luigi Mangione: 'Favourite Luigi in American history'
Article Text:
Stay updated with our Live Blog for minute-by-minute coverage of the

Stay updated with our Live Blog for minute-by-minute coverage of the Israel Iran War including breaking news, missile attacks, and Middle East crisis Latest Updates

Charlie Day, star of the upcoming Super Mario Galaxy Movie, found himself unable to resist a question about his “favourite Luigi in recent American history” during a recent interview in Tokyo.Day was speaking alongside co-stars and Hollywood actors Anya Taylor-Joy and Keegan-Michael Key on the comedy podcast Tintoria when the hosts asked who he considered the top Luigi. The question was clearly intended as a joke, referencing a controversial real-life figure, but Day played along.“I’m top of the Luigi game, but Mangione comes in second,” Day said, prompting Taylor-Joy to try to hide her smile and Keegan-Michael Key to burst into laughter.The joke references Luigi Mangione, who is currently facing both state and federal charges over the December 2024 murder of UnitedHealthCare CEO Brian Thompson. Mangione remains in federal custody, and his New York state murder trial is now scheduled to start in September.While the internet has long made jokes linking Luigi Mangione to the video game character due to their shared first name, Day’s comments mark one of the first times the comparison has been made in an interview connected to an official Nintendo project.The moment came roughly ten minutes into the podcast, and the hosts praised Day for giving them “the answer of their dreams.” Despite the laughter, it is a reminder that some audiences may not find the joke amusing given Mangione’s legal situation.
Article Summary: Charlie Day, star of the upcoming Super Mario Galaxy Movie, found himself unable to resist a question about his “favourite Luigi in recent American history” during a recent interview in Tokyo. The joke references Luigi Mangione, who is currently facing both state and federal charges over the December 2024 murder of UnitedHealthCare CEO Brian Thompson.

Article Title: Sundar Pichai : Google CEO Sundar Pichai shares post as NASA's Artemis II moon mission launches with four astronauts
Article Text:
Objective of NASA’s Artemis mission







Four astronauts blasted off aboard a NASA rocket on April 1 for a long-waited trip around the moon, America’s first crewed lunar flyby in more than 50 years. Google CEO Sundar Pichai celebrated NASA's Artemis II liftoff, wishing success to the four-astronaut crew on their 10-day lunar flyby mission. Pichai shared a post on X (formerly Twitter) writing: “And we have liftoff! 🚀 Wishing the best to the Artemis II crew on their incredible journey ahead. ” In the post, Pichai also highlighted the inspiring view of earth from space. “Imagining the amazing view they have, looking down at Earth from space would be a beautiful thing,” he wrote.As mentioned above, Artemis II is America's first crewed lunar flyby in more than 50 years with NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and CSA (Canadian Space Agency) astronaut Jeremy Hansen on board.“Today’s launch marks a defining moment for our nation and for all who believe in exploration. Artemis II builds on the vision set by President Donald J. Trump, returning humanity to the Moon for the first time in more than 50 years and opening the next chapter of lunar exploration beyond Apollo. Aboard Orion are four remarkable explorers preparing for the first crewed flight of this rocket and spacecraft, a true test mission that will carry them farther and faster than any humans in a generation,” said NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman.“Artemis II is the start of something bigger than any one mission. It marks our return to the Moon, not just to visit, but to eventually stay on our Moon Base, and lays the foundation for the next giant leaps ahead.”As the first crewed mission of NASA’s Artemis program, among its objectives, the flight will demonstrate life support systems for the first time with crew and lay the foundation for an enduring presence on the Moon ahead of future missions to Mars. The astronauts will take photographs and provide observations of the Moon’s surface as the first people to lay eyes on some areas of the far side. Although the lunar far side will only be partially illuminated during the flyby, the conditions should create shadows that stretch across the surface, enhancing relief and revealing depth, ridges, slopes and crater rims that are often difficult to detect under full illumination.Crew observations and other human health scientific investigations during the mission, such as AVATAR, will inform science during future Moon missions.
Article Summary: Four astronauts blasted off aboard a NASA rocket on April 1 for a long-waited trip around the moon. It is America’s first crewed lunar flyby in more than 50 years. Google CEO Sundar Pichai celebrated NASA's Artemis II liftoff, wishing success to the four-astronaut crew.

As Sunrisers Hyderabad prepare to take on Lucknow Super Giants in a crucial IPL 2026 clash, both teams are still searching for early rhythm. With combinations still being tested, individual performances could once again play a decisive role.Here are five players who could shape the contest:Abhishek Sharma remains a key figure at the top for SRH. He has enjoyed success against LSG, scoring 160 runs in five matches, including a top score of 75*. This season, he has already shown his aggressive intent, scoring 55 runs in two games at a strike rate close to 190. His recent outings, including a 48 against KKR and a 52 for India earlier this year, highlight his growing consistency. His 59 off just 20 balls against LSG previously underlines his ability to take the game away early.Heinrich Klaasen continues to be the backbone of SRH’s middle order. With 120 runs in four matches against LSG, he has proven to be a reliable performer in this fixture. In IPL 2026, he has already accumulated 83 runs in two matches, including a half-century.Scores of 52 and 31 in recent outings further reflect his consistency. His ability to handle pressure and accelerate in the middle overs makes him a crucial asset.Jaydev Unadkat has been one of SRH’s standout bowlers despite modest numbers against LSG historically. He has picked up four wickets in two matches this season, including an impressive 3/21 in the previous game. Even though he has only two wickets in three matches against LSG, his current form suggests he could play a key role, especially in controlling the middle overs.Mitchell Marsh brings balance to LSG as a proven all-rounder. He has scored 236 runs in eight matches against SRH and also has a four-wicket haul to his name. His IPL 2026 campaign began with a 35, while his recent international form includes scores of 64* and 54. He also struck 65 against SRH in a previous meeting, underlining his impact in this matchup.Nicholas Pooran has an outstanding record against SRH, amassing 362 runs in 11 matches at an average above 50. Although he managed only 8 runs in his first game this season, his past performances make him a constant threat. His 45 off 26 balls in the clash against SRH highlights his ability to shift momentum quickly once he gets going.With SRH looking to build on their improved structure and LSG aiming to address their tactical concerns, these five players could have a major say in how the contest unfolds.

Article Title: Tremors in ASR district in Andhra Pradesh, Koraput of Odisha cause panic
Article Text:
Representative Image





VISAKHAPATNAM: Tremors were felt in parts of Alluri Sitharama Raju (ASR) district in Andhra Pradesh and Koraput district in Odisha on Saturday night.People in many parts of Paderu, Pedabayalu, Munchingiputtu, Araku Valley and few other mandals in ASR and few parts of southern region (Koraput district) of Odisha ran out of their houses on Saturday night and took shelters on streets following the earthquake around 11.31 pm on Saturday.We were watching an IPL match on a mobile phone when everything started shaking. Residents who were in asleep, woke after they felt tremors for a few seconds, ran out of their houses, said Suresh Kumar, a native of Pedabayalu mandal in ASR district. Suspecting that they may feel the tremors again, some of the residents stayed outdoors till 2 am on Sunday, he added.An earthquake of magnitude 4.4 occurred on April 4 (Saturday) at 11:01 pm in Koraput district of Odisha according to the National Center for Seismology. The quake was located at a very shallow depth of 5 km.
Article Summary: Tremors were felt in parts of Alluri Sitharama Raju (ASR) district in Andhra Pradesh and Koraput district in Odisha on Saturday night. People in many parts of Paderu, Pedabayalu, Munchingiputtu, Araku Valley and few other mandals in ASR and few parts of southern region of Odisha ran out of their houses.

Article Title: Tamil Nadu politicians unveil their unique hobbies; A glimpse into their lives outside political commitments
Article Text:
It’s not easy for a full-time politician to find time for leisure time activities, especially in the run-up to the assembly election. But here is what some of TN’s changemakers are up to when they’re not in the public eye

Sundays in my garden

From coast to coasters

Watch Tamil Nadu Elections 2026: M.K. Stalin vs AIADMK — Will Vijay Be the X-Factor? Tamil Nadu Elections 2026: M.K. Stalin vs AIADMK — Will Vijay Be the X-Factor?

The boxer at heart

Time traveller

Of sangam, song and semboths





The first family of Tamil Naduhas no time to pursue hobbies,but Tamil Nadu CM M K Stalinmakes sure his day begins with arefreshing two-hour walk starting 6am, at the Theosophical Societygrounds. And then, an occasional cycle ride.Sundays are special: he spends the morningsin his flower garden in Poonamallee. TheDMK president started attending politicalmeets right from his school days and so never had much time to devote to hobbies outside politics. He, however, is a cricket fan, especially of M S Dhoni. He watches matcheswhen time allows, including the T-20. Peopleclose to the family say CM and son Udhayanidhi find time to read books.An avid travel buff, two-time Congress MP Karti Chidambaram makes it a point to buy a postcard wherever he travels. “No one writes or posts letters these days, so I get a postcard from each city and add the date to it. I carry it home with me as a souvenir. They’re all over my mantelpiece now.” His recent visits to Vienna, Barcelona and Paris all added to his postcard collection. Another hobby of the University of Cambridge law graduate is to take home a paper coaster from the restaurants he visits.“These are all ways for me to remember the city,” he says. But while in Chennai, he turns to his two four-legged stress busters, whom, he says, are as naughty as they come. “In Chennai, life revolves around my golden retrievers Becky and Daisy.”An expert boxer, weight lifter, swimmer, and a surprisingly good carrom player, former AIADMK minister D Jayakumar was actively into all kinds of sports during his school and college days, he says. “After I became minister, I have not been able to pursue boxing, but I used to take part in competitions.” At 65, Jayakumar swims a few laps across the pool every day and hits the gym late at night before going to bed, at 11pm.Of late, he has started watching crime thrillers on OTT. “But what really energises me is listening to songs from MGR movies.”TVCK MP D Ravikumar says at the outset that all his hobbies are “quite serious”.“I’m a writer but more a voracious reader and find time to read at least two hours a day, often till 2am. I have published journals in Tamil, on history and dalit literature, and I edit journals. I have translated 50 books on philosophy from English to Tamil, from Michel Foucault to Edward Said besides nearly 500 poems.” And he writes by typing on his mobile, something he does on the go, especially columns for news outlets.But when he’s not reading, you will find him travelling to 1000-year-old temples to study sculptures. “I’m interested in archaeology and epigraphy, and my latest visit was to the Anantheeswaran temple in Chidambaram.”Even amidst fierce campaigning, South Chennai DMK MP Thamizhachi Thangapandian’s go-to place is a corner in her home where she sits and reads. “Depending on my mood, I choose between comfort reading, motivational reading and lazy lounge reading,” says the MP. She was introduced to reading when she was young, and was always fascinated by books, being a literature student, she says. “For relaxation, I turn to Sufi and Sangam poems and zen stories besides the teachings of Osho and ‘riddle haiku’ or the puzzles in Japanese poems. ”It’s while going through classical Tamil literature, especially classical Sangam poetry, that she realised how inadequate her knowledge of her mother tongue was. “The same thing happens whenever I translate something from English to Tamil or vice versa, although I have a PhD in English. I have lots to learn.”And at the end of long and stressful campaign days, she unwinds at her native village, where, she says, they still “wake up to the chirping of birds”. “I love sitting on the banks of the canal lined with trees and watching the birds; I’m not an expert but I can identify the local birds such as semboth.”A recent hobby which she developed during Covid days is binge-watching TV series. “I started off with K-dramas and later switched over to series based on war and period series.” These days, she also finds pleasure in telling stories to her grandchildren, surrounded by her pet cats and dogs, which, she says, is how she grew up as a child.Late chief minister J Jayalalithaa, who had a collection of English classics at her home, had often said in interviews that her dream is to retire to a farm, surround herself with books and music, and her pet dogsAn avid badminton player, PMK founder Anbumani Ramadoss is the president of the Tamil Nadu Badminton Association (TNBA) and finds time to play the sport whenever possibleHealth minister Ma Subramanian is actively into running marathons, and has completed more than 160, a recent one being at the Meghamalai Hills
Article Summary: The first family of Tamil Naduhas no time to pursue hobbies, but Tamil Nadu CM M K Stalin makes sure his day begins with a two-hour walk. Former AIADMK minister D Jayakumar was actively into all kinds of sports during his school and college days.

Article Text:

Article Title: Yuvraj Singh on SRH’s Abhishek Sharma captaincy snub: ‘Now with what frame of mind will he play’?
Article Text:
Former India cricketer Yuvraj Singh, Abhishek Sharma's mentor, has stated that it is disappointing for any player who has given his ‘heart and soul’ to the franchise ‘ for years’ to have missed out on leading the side. SRH had announced Ishan Kishan as the stand-in skipper for IPL 2026, snubbing Abhishek and the decision had not gone down well with a section of the fans and even some cricket experts.

Poll Do you think Ishan Kishan is ready for the captaincy role in IPL? Yes, he has proven himself. No, he lacks experience as a captain.

One of the biggest talking points leading up to the start of IPL 2026 was the Sunrisers Hyderabad's choice of captain in the absence of regular skipper Pat Cummins. SRH announced Ishan Kishan as the stand-in skipper, snubbing Abhishek Sharma and the decision did not go down well with a section of the fans and even cricket experts. Now, former India cricketer Yuvraj Singh, Abhishek’s mentor, has stated that it is disappointing for any player who has given his ‘heart and soul’ to the franchise ‘ for years’ to have missed out on leading the side.“It is disappointing. I love Ishan Kishan. I have seen his growth as well in Indian cricket, his comeback as well,” Yuvraj Singh said in SportsTak Podcast. “If I give you an example, switch this from a player’s perspective - say if Abhishek Sharma, before the World Cup, came into the team, his state team won, scored a hundred in the final, came into the World Cup team, he scores runs and he is captain of the franchise.“On the other hand, Ishan Kishan, playing for one franchise for seven years, has performed, given his heart and soul for the franchise and also captains the state side as well, but does not get captaincy; he gets the vice-captaincy. Now what frame of mind he plays franchise cricket with - with a bit of disappointment.”However, Yuvraj Singh opined that this snub is something that Abhishek should take as motivation and they try to do even better than what he is doing currently."If it happened with me, I have to be clear, 'listen, this has happened, I am disappointed'. I spoke to Abhishek as well and told him we are going to put that disappointment aside and I will support my captain and I will try and do even better, because something has hurt me, ab aur zor lagaunga, to do better. That should be your motivation," said Yuvraj.While there has been official communication from SRH on the reason to pick Kishan over Abhishek, but the general feeling is that Ishan, who made a return to the Indian team after two years and has stellar World Cup campaign scoring 317 runs, had led his state side Jharkhand to the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy - India’s premier domestic T20 tournament - including a century in the final and 517 runs in the tournament to go with - was the ideal choice for the stop-gap arrangement.Further explaining Kishan's choice as skipper by SRH , Yuvraj looked back at his India career and the time when MS Dhoni was made the India captain in 2007 despite the presence of senior players. "For example, when I was in the Indian team, Harbhajan Singh, Virender Sehwag were seniors, I was vice-captain, but from nowhere MS Dhoni comes and becomes captain. Whatever the reasons maybe ... franchise cricket will not determine if you will captain India.You look at Shubman Gill; because everyone felt he is most hardworking, most sincere about the game, he thinks about cricket in a different way, and selectors felt this guy should captain India. Maybe same way Dhoni was made captain. And if someone is destined to captain, to do great things for India, that will happen.," said Yuvraj.Cummins, who led SRH in 2024 and 2025 is recovering from a back injury, and even though he has joined the SRH squad he is still unavailable for selection. The injury had ruled him out of the 2026 T20 World Cup. The Australian, though, has given his stamp of approval on Ishan’s elevation, stating, “Ishan had a really successful captaincy stint with his local side in the last year or so..’.
Article Summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad announced Ishan Kishan as the stand-in skipper for IPL 2026. The decision did not go down well with a section of the fans and even cricket experts. Yuvraj Singh, Abhishek’s mentor, has stated that it is disappointing for any player who has given his ‘heart and soul’ to the franchise ‘ for years’
